title: Using machine learning to simultaneously quantify multiple cognitive components of episodic memory

跨学科关系.head: Transfer Learning
跨学科关系.relation: leveraged to predict neural activity related to
跨学科关系.evidence: Using a machine learning algorithm known as "transfer learning", we leveraged visual perception, sustained attention, and selective attention brain states to better predict episodic memory performance

跨学科关系.head: Transfer Learning
跨学科关系.relation: applied to decode cognitive components of
跨学科关系.evidence: leveraged visual perception, sustained attention, and selective attention brain states to better predict episodic memory performance

跨学科关系.head: Transfer Learning
跨学科关系.relation: utilized to analyze brain states for memory prediction
跨学科关系.evidence: leveraged visual perception, sustained attention, and selective attention brain states to better predict episodic memory performance

跨学科关系.head: Transfer Learning
跨学科关系.relation: employed to assess contribution of attentional states to encoding
跨学科关系.evidence: leveraged visual perception, sustained attention, and selective attention brain states to better predict episodic memory performance

跨学科关系.head: Cognitive Domains
跨学科关系.relation: improve prediction performance when jointly considered
跨学科关系.evidence: this multidimensional treatment of memory decoding improved prediction performance compared to traditional, unidimensional methods

跨学科关系.head: Multi-Source Transfer Learning
跨学科关系.relation: enables decoding of neural activity across multiple cognitive tasks
跨学科关系.evidence: transfer learning with multiple sources typically being EEG activity associated with the same cognitive task

跨学科关系.head: High-Low Perception Classifier
跨学科关系.relation: provides features to predict perception levels during encoding
跨学科关系.evidence: train a high vs. low perception performance classifier... transfer the gained knowledge to encoding-related brain activity

跨学科关系.head: Visual Perception
跨学科关系.relation: constitutes a multidimensional component of memory formation
跨学科关系.evidence: episodic memory is believed to be a multidimensional process in which various cognitive functions including perception contribute to memory formation

跨学科关系.head: Sustained Attention
跨学科关系.relation: modulates memory performance through brain state interactions
跨学科关系.evidence: presenting to-be-encoded stimuli during high vs. low sustained attention brain states enhances episodic memory performance

跨学科关系.head: Selective Attention
跨学科关系.relation: failure to engage leads to ineffective memory consolidation
跨学科关系.evidence: Did they fail to maintain their attention? Were they not selectively attending to that event and effectively ignoring distracting information?

生物学.rationale: 提供认知组件的神经基础和脑状态分析，支持记忆形成机制的多维度建模

title: Structural visualization of small molecule recognition by CXCR3 uncovers dual-agonism in the CXCR3-CXCR7 system

跨学科关系.head: CXCR3
跨学科关系.relation: shares common natural agonist CXCL11 while exhibiting prototypical GPCR signaling
跨学科关系.evidence: CXCR3 and CXCR7 constitute a pair wherein the former is a prototypical GPCR while the latter exhibits selective coupling to βarrs despite sharing a common natural agonist: CXCL11

跨学科关系.head: cryo-EM structures
跨学科关系.relation: reveal structural snapshots uncovering
跨学科关系.evidence: we determine cryo-EM structures of CXCR3... These structural snapshots uncover an allosteric network bridging the ligand-binding pocket

跨学科关系.head: orthosteric binding pocket
跨学科关系.relation: structural topology allows discovery and validation of
跨学科关系.evidence: structural topology of the orthosteric binding pocket also allows us to discover and validate that selected small molecule agonists of CXCR3 display robust agonism at CXCR7

跨学科关系.head: signaling-bias
跨学科关系.relation: provides molecular insights into
跨学科关系.evidence: study offers molecular insights into signaling-bias and dual agonism in the CXCR3-CXCR7 system

跨学科关系.head: small molecule agonists
跨学科关系.relation: recognize through modular orthosteric ligand binding pocket
跨学科关系.evidence: CXCR3 and CXCR7 also recognize small molecule agonists suggesting a modular orthosteric ligand binding pocket

跨学科关系.head: VUF11418
跨学科关系.relation: acts as G-protein-biased agonist at
跨学科关系.evidence: VUF11418... developed as G-protein-biased agonist of CXCR3

跨学科关系.head: VUF10661
跨学科关系.relation: exhibits βarr-biased agonism at
跨学科关系.evidence: VUF10661 is characterized as βarr-biased agonist of CXCR3

跨学科关系.head: chemokine receptors
跨学科关系.relation: exhibit conserved
跨学科关系.evidence: chemokine receptors exhibit a conserved seven-transmembrane architecture characteristic of prototypical GPCRs

跨学科关系.head: ligand-directed signaling bias
跨学科关系.relation: principles explored through
跨学科关系.evidence: significant promiscuity amongst chemokines for the chemokine receptors makes them an interesting system to explore the principles of ligand-directed signaling bias

跨学科关系.head: non-canonical complexes
跨学科关系.relation: formation promoted by
跨学科关系.evidence: CXCL11... promotes the formation of non-canonical CXCR3-Gαi-βarr complexes

基础医学.rationale: 解析趋化因子受体家族的结构与免疫调节功能

生物学.rationale: 阐释G蛋白偶联受体的结构特征与信号转导机制

化学.rationale: 提供小分子激动剂库及受体选择性调控方案

title: Pt nanocluster-Fe single atom pairs dual-regulate charge extraction and interfacial reaction for enhanced photoelectric response

跨学科关系.head: Pt-Fe双金属催化剂
跨学科关系.relation: 通过Pt纳米簇-Fe单原子对调节固液界面性质
跨学科关系.evidence: integrate Pt nanocluster-Fe single-atom pairs with CuO to regulate both solid-solid and solid-liquid interfaces

跨学科关系.head: 欧姆接触
跨学科关系.relation: 在CuO/Pt界面形成的欧姆接触加速电子提取
跨学科关系.evidence: an Ohmic contact at the CuO/Pt interface accelerates electron extraction

跨学科关系.head: 电荷转移机制
跨学科关系.relation: Pt到Fe的电荷转移增强氧还原反应动力学
跨学科关系.evidence: Pt-to-Fe charge transfer enhances oxygen reduction at Fe sites

跨学科关系.head: 螯合效应
跨学科关系.relation: 草甘膦的螯合效应通过阻断电子转移实现超低检测限
跨学科关系.evidence: exploiting chelating effect of glyphosate on CuO to impede electron transfer, achieving a detection limit of 0.41 ng/mL

跨学科关系.head: DFT计算
跨学科关系.relation: 密度泛函理论计算揭示界面反应势垒的协同调控机制
跨学科关系.evidence: through experimental investigations and DFT calculations

跨学科关系.head: 纳米簇-单原子对
跨学科关系.relation: 纳米簇-单原子对设计提升能量转换效率
跨学科关系.evidence: advances cocatalyst design for enhanced energy conversion

跨学科关系.head: 电子转移通道
跨学科关系.relation: 构建电子转移通道抑制载流子复合
跨学科关系.evidence: construct an electron transfer highway to mitigate charge recombination

材料科学.rationale: 通过纳米结构设计与载体优化实现电荷传输性能提升

物理学.rationale: 揭示电子转移机制与界面势垒调控的物理本质规律
